messages.content: Hi, we placed an order for our son's books and other materials from www.kydsmart.com. Didn't receive anything till today (April 2, 2018). He is studying in Birla High School and the school opens today. He is going without books, notebooks and proper shoes. Order no. is 18832. Please look into this matter urgently. Thanks. Sourov Roy

share.share_text: For a superior and amazing shopping experience, Kydsmart ensures extensive quality checks from storage to final packaging. We have partnered with leading vendors ans all branded products sold on Kydsmart are 100% genuine.
